title: No Shade
body:
This mod removes the shadow behind text from the game, making the text appear flat and stylised. 

While this is primarily for cosmetic reasons it may also increase FPS on text heavy screens.

### Before: 
![Before](https://i.blamejared.com/WxgJM.png)

### After:
![After](https://i.blamejared.com/dytbr.png)
